lines: ✘ [ERROR] A request to the Cloudflare API (/accounts/<redacted-token>/workers/services/<redacted-token>) failed.
Please ensure it has the correct permissions for this operation.
✘ [ERROR] Failed to automatically retrieve account IDs for the logged in user.

You may have incorrect permissions on your API token, or your authentication may have expired. Try running `wrangler login` to re-authenticate. You can also skip this account check by adding an `account_id` in your Wrangler configuration file, or by setting the value of CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID
